article.title: Interview Guidance
article.content:
Hi All,

Past 6 months have been nothing less than a roller coaster ride. In past 6 months I have interviewed with multiple companies and got a few offers. 

I got offer from Zomato, CoinDCX, Meesho, Slice, Nutanix and LinkedIn. But I couldn't crack Cred, Google, Amazon, De-Shaw, Uber, Toast, Arista Networks. 

I feel like all the companies that i cracked was because I might have been lucky. I feel a little demotivated since I couldn't crack the ones' that I actually wanted. 

Is my judgement correct and I need to put a lot more efforts for them (if so then in what direction) or was I just not lucky those days? 

Some guidance will be really helpfull.

About me: 3+ YOE, previously working with a FinTech company.

post.content: How are you getting too many interviews, bro?
LinkedIn would be giving you at par with Amazon, Uber, De-Shaw. I don\'t think there\'s much to worry about.
feels more like a flex post. Some people are not even getting offers bro. \n\nBe happy with that you have got so many offers

I think you are correct about luck playing a role, though I would say don\'t be demotivated. \nKeep giving your best, btw Congrats on the offers received.\nWould be great if you discuss how you applied for above opportunities and prep strategy.
